reflections.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning block (not shown to users).

event.description: true = actionable time-coordination event; LLM should call convert_time tool

sender_id.description: Platform user ID echoed from SENDER block; passed through to convert_time tool

sender_name.description: Display name echoed from SENDER block; used in formatted reply

time.description: Extracted times in 24h format. Empty array when event=false.

city.description: Parallel to 'time'. City/region as explicit TZ context for time[i], or null → use sender DB TZ.
